description:
Implement `hx-combobox` (T1-14) — 6/6 enterprise libraries ship this. URGENT: last missing T1 foundation component.

**Component behavior:** Text input with associated listbox for autocomplete/typeahead. Supports filtering, free-text entry, keyboard navigation (Arrow keys, Enter to select, Escape to close), and async option loading.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-combobox/`:
- `index.ts` — re-export
- `hx-combobox.ts` — Lit component class
- `hx-combobox.styles.ts` — Lit CSS tagged template (`--hx-*` tokens only)
- `hx-combobox.stories.ts` — Storybook stories for all variants
- `hx-combobox.test.ts` — Vitest browser tests (80%+ coverage)

**Props:** `value`, `placeholder`, `disabled`, `required`, `name`, `hx-size` (sm/md/lg), `multiple` (boolean), `clearable` (boolean), `loading` (boolean), `filter-debounce` (ms)

**Slots:** `option` (repeated hx-option children), `prefix`, `suffix`, `empty-label`

**Events:** `hx-input`, `hx-change`, `hx-clear`, `hx-show`, `hx-hide`

**CSS Parts:** `input`, `listbox`, `trigger`, `clear-button`, `loading-indicator`

**Keyboard:** Arrow Down opens listbox and moves focus, Arrow Up/Down navigate options, Enter selects, Escape closes, Tab closes and moves focus

**ARIA:** `role="combobox"`, `aria-expanded`, `aria-autocomplete="list"`, `aria-controls` pointing to listbox, `aria-activedescendant` tracking focused option

**Reference components:** Study `hx-select` for listbox pattern, `hx-text-input` for input foundation. Follow conventions exactly.

**ElementInternals:** Use for form participation (`setFormValue`, `setValidity`). Label association via `internals.setFormAssociatedElement`.

**Quality gates — all must pass:**
1. `npm run type-check` — zero errors
2. All tests pass, 80%+ coverage
3. axe-core: zero violations
4. Storybook stories for: default, with-options, multiple, clearable, loading, disabled, async
5. `npm run cem` — accurate CEM output
6. Bundle < 5KB min+gz
7. Drupal: renders from `<hx-combobox>` in Twig with no framework

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and add entry point in `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-combobox — T1-14 Autocomplete/Combobox Input
